member.summary: Upload assets to the folder
member.remarks: Request body contains a single file when no is provided. When is specified, the file is streamed from the remote URL instead.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Web.Validators.BlobFolderValidator.FolderNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[^0-9a-z -]
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [^ \-0-9a-z].

member.summary: Custom -derived type for the FolderNameRegex method.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.FolderNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.
